case_title: MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA VS. UDAYKUMAR SHETTY ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHETTY, UDAYKUMAR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 222 BEALE STREET, #805B, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94105, SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA SERVED FEB-25-2019, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT SHETTY, UDAYKUMAR
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT SHETTY, UDAYKUMAR DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SHETTY, UDAYKUMAR DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (NO SASE. ENDORSED COPY PLACED IN D501 OUTBOX)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA SERVED FEB-25-2019, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SHETTY, UDAYKUMAR

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT SHETTY, UDAYKUMAR DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION RE RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $38.83 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SHETTY, UDAYKUMAR
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
